project.title: The interactome of G3BP1 in UMUC3 cells
project.projectDescription: The HA-tagged G3BP1 complex was obtained by co-IP with anti-HA antibodies from UMUC3 cells stably expressing HA-tagged G3BP1. The purified immunoprecipitants were resolved on gradient SDS-PAGE, silver-stained, and subjected to MS analysis.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: The gels were minced and then destained with 50% acetonitrile in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate. The proteins were reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) at 56°C and alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide at RT in the dark. Trypsin digestion was performed for 20 h at 37°C. The peptides were extracted with 1% trifluoroacetic acid in 50% acetonitrile. To carry out the MS analysis, samples were vacuum-dried and reconstituted with 0.1% formic acid. The pretreated samples were examined by nanoscale liquid chromatography coupled to tandem mass spectrometry (nano LC-MS/MS).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Data were acquired with data-dependent analysis and processed with PLGS software (Waters), and the resulting peak list was searched against the National Center for Biotechnology Information (NCBI) database with the Mascot search engine.

references.referenceLine: Zheng X, Chen J, Deng M, Ning K, Peng Y, Liu Z, Li X, Zhou Z, Tang H, Li Y, Kang T, Liu Z. G3BP1 and SLU7 Jointly Promote Immune Evasion by Downregulating MHC-I via PI3K/Akt Activation in Bladder Cancer. Adv Sci (Weinh). 2024 11(7):e2305922
